config.name: applicationLinkName
config.help: Optional Creator application link name. Use oho-erp only when reading from another app.

config.help: Item report link name used to read OP_Stock and OP_Stock_Value.

config.help: Lookup field link name in the Stock form.

config.help: Warehouse field link name in the Stock form.

config.help: Balance stock value field link name in the Stock form.

config.help: Item name field link name in the Item form.
